raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX XXXX Bloomingdales Card Ending # XXXX Dispute # : XXXX Amount : {$4200.00} Subject : Merchandise Not Received I made a purchase through Bloomingdales in the amount of {$4200.00}. The item associated with this charge was not delivered to my apartment. 

Although the tracking information shows the package as delivered by XXXX, I did not receive the merchandise. There is no proof confirming delivery to my apartment unit, no signature, and no delivery photo with my apartment number showing where the package was left. 
I reported this issue, but the claim was denied even though the item was not received. Bloomingdales wants to hold me accountable for this.
